market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Sleep 7 in Quinton's Spacious 3 Bed House
Perfect 3 Bed House in Quinton for 7
analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to this spacious 3 bed house in Quinton, perfect for families or groups of up to 7 people. With 4 guests, you'll enjoy plenty of space to relax and make memories. As a Superhost-in-training, I've worked hard to ensure this house is immaculately clean and well-maintained. You'll have access to a fully equipped kitchen, a large living room, and 3 bedrooms with comfortable beds. The house is just a short walk from local shops and pubs. You're just a 20-minute drive from Birmingham city centre. Whether you're visiting for business or pleasure, this house is the perfect base for you.
analysis.photo_order_rec: First, use a well-lit photo of the living room, showcasing its spaciousness and style. This will immediately give guests a sense of the house's overall feel.
key_diagnosis: This listing could significantly improve its occupancy rate by offering a lower rate (£175.00 median) to attract more bookings, considering it's already above 90% booked capacity (47 open nights).
The host should consider adding an outdoor space amenity to attract more guests, given the competitive median (£175.00) nightly rate and the nearby availability of similar listings.
The lack of photos is a major issue, with an unknown photo count. Adding at least 5-6 room-type-specific photos is crucial, including a high-quality lead photo of the living room.
analysis.outreach_hook: By adding a small outdoor space, you could attract more guests and fill your 47 open nights – currently averaging just £199.00 per night.
